ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: !CONTAINS( $Profile.Name , 'System Admin') && ISBLANK(Key_Sales__c)&&ISBLANK( Sales_member01__c )&&ISBLANK( Sales_member02__c )&&ISBLANK( Sales_member03__c )&&ISBLANK( Sales_member04__c )&&ISBLANK( Sales_member05__c )&&ISBLANK( Sales_member06__c )&&ISBLANK( Sales_member07__c )&&ISBLANK( Sales_member08__c )&&ISBLANK( Sales_member09__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please input this product line sales people in sales information section!
